items.headline: The Association – Post Up – 4/27/2026
items.description: Recap all the Playoff action around the NBA from April 27, 2026 on The Association: Post Up.

items.headline: Game Recap: Nuggets 125, Timberwolves 113
items.description: The Denver Nuggets defeated the Minnesota Timberwolves, 125-113, moving the series to 3-2.

items.headline: Game Recap: Thunder 131, Suns 122
items.description: The Thunder defeated the Suns, 131-122, to win the series 4-0 and move on to the 2nd round of the Western Conference Playoffs

items.headline: Nikola Jokić puts up 27-12-16 triple-double in Game 5 win
items.description: Nikola Jokić finishes with 27 points, 12 rebounds and 16 assists in a Game 5 win over the Timberwolves.
